programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: The sixteenth series of a program about the production process of objects that surround us.Viewers will see with their own eyes how complex the achievements of modern engineering and technology can be.

programme.title: How the Universe Works 5
programme.sub-title: The mystery of the ninth planet
programme.desc: A series presenting the elements that make up the Universe.Thanks to computer graphics, viewers will be able to see unusual astronomical objects found in space.

programme.sub-title: The most dangerous corners of space

programme.title: Blowing Up History 4
programme.desc: The secrets of building mythical and legendary buildings of antiquity.The program presents presentations using computer animations and the latest results of archaeological research.

programme.title: Blowing Up History 4
programme.desc: The secrets of building mythical and legendary buildings of antiquity.The program presents presentations using computer animations and the latest results of archaeological research.

programme.title: How It's Made 26
programme.desc: In everyday life, people are surrounded by numerous objects.Few wonder how they were created.Most of them are ordinary, prosaic and uninteresting things.However, they often play an important role.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?

programme.title: How It's Made: Dream Cars
programme.desc: The hosts of the series take viewers on a fascinating trip to the world of the automotive industry.We will learn how the luxury cars that many drivers dream of were created.

programme.title: Incredible Engineering Blunders: Fixed
programme.desc: Justin and his team travel around the world in search of the greatest engineering mistakes.They analyze whether such errors can still be corrected.

programme.title: Incredible Engineering Blunders: Fixed
programme.desc: Justin and his team travel around the world in search of the greatest engineering mistakes.They analyze whether such errors can still be corrected.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: The program's creators present various types of phenomena and how celestial bodies function.Scientists will unravel the secrets of astronomy.The series will use innovative computer animation techniques.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.sub-title: The last secrets of the Cassini probe
programme.desc: The program's creators present various types of phenomena and how celestial bodies function.Scientists will unravel the secrets of astronomy.The series will use innovative computer animation techniques.

programme.title: How It's Made 25
programme.sub-title: Rubber balls for games, office chairs
programme.desc: Another series of programs in which we look at how everyday objects are made.Creators visit factories and processing plants and reveal the behind-the-scenes of the production of various things.

programme.title: How It's Made 25
programme.sub-title: Screws for the aviation industry, prickly pear fruit puree
programme.desc: Another series of programs in which we look at how everyday objects are made.Creators visit factories and processing plants and reveal the behind-the-scenes of the production of various things.

programme.title: How It's Made 25
programme.sub-title: Beds hidden in the wall, ice cream cups
programme.desc: Another series of programs in which we look at how everyday objects are made.Creators visit factories and processing plants and reveal the behind-the-scenes of the production of various things.

programme.title: How It's Made 26
programme.desc: In everyday life, people are surrounded by numerous objects.Few wonder how they were created.Most of them are ordinary, prosaic and uninteresting things.However, they often play an important role.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown
programme.sub-title: Mysterious ruins from the Stone Age

programme.title: Houdini's Last Secrets
programme.desc: Harry Houdini gained international fame thanks to his amazing magic tricks.To this day, modern illusionists are inspired by his shows, during which he risked his life.His escapes and other fascinating tricks were breathtaking.In this documentary series, a team of experts tries to recreate his tricks and discover the magician's innermost secrets, from the famous water chamber to catching a projectile.Others lost their lives while performing these mysterious tricks.Perhaps Houdini himself paid for one of his exploits with his life.

programme.title: Super Factories: Food Edition
programme.desc: Thanks to computer graphics, viewers will see the process of creating well-known food products from a new perspective.

programme.title: How the Universe Works 5
programme.desc: A series presenting the elements that make up the Universe.Thanks to computer graphics, viewers will be able to see unusual astronomical objects found in space.

programme.title: How the Universe Works 5
programme.sub-title: Life and death on the Red Planet
programme.desc: A series presenting the elements that make up the Universe.Thanks to computer graphics, viewers will be able to see unusual astronomical objects found in space.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files 3
programme.desc: NASA cameras have so far recorded countless mysterious objects in space.Documentarians will thoroughly analyze the most difficult to explain peculiarities observed by astronauts in space.Outstanding scientists and astronauts will express their opinions about them.Viewers will see interesting footage.They will find out whether science can explain these mysterious phenomena and how likely it is that NASA cameras captured traces of extraterrestrial life.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files 3
programme.desc: NASA cameras have so far recorded countless mysterious objects in space.Documentarians will thoroughly analyze the most difficult to explain peculiarities observed by astronauts in space.Outstanding scientists and astronauts will express their opinions about them.Viewers will see interesting footage.They will find out whether science can explain these mysterious phenomena and how likely it is that NASA cameras captured traces of extraterrestrial life.

programme.title: Truth Behind the Moon Landing
programme.desc: The moon landing is still the subject of many conspiracy theories.Some even believe it never happened.The program tries to answer the question whether the event could have been a fake.

programme.title: How Do They Do It? 11
programme.desc: Documentary filmmakers reveal the secrets of the production of objects and devices.They meet inventive engineers and designers whose life mission is to improve reality.
